decision: Chunk B — Govern the foundation. Clean namespaces, code from graph, test automation, end-to-end harvest.
name: Foundation Governance Pipeline

steps.title: Rewire code generation to read from RDF graph, not HTML
End-to-end harvest: Notes + Stories through ICD pipeline

demo.method: Run Notes harvest end-to-end: ICD defines fields → code generated from RDF → harvester runs → validation gate checks → data lands in graph → page renders with compliance numbers
demo.gate: Notes and Stories both pass the full pipeline. Tests green. Namespaces clean.
demo.acceptance: The system governs itself — no manual steps between ICD definition and rendered page.

history.event: Pipeline created. Step 1 unblocked. Steps 2+3 parallel after 1. Step 4 after 2+3. Demo: end-to-end harvest run.
Step 1 (#1540) completed — namespace migration done by Silas. Steps 2+3 unblocked.
Step 2 (#1555) completed — code gen rewired to RDF by Silas. Step 3 (#1554) pulled to WIP by Kade.
Manifest sync — steps 1+2 marked completed (were stale). Kade idle on step 3 (#1554). Step 4 blocked on #1554.
Step 3 (#1554) completed — 22 integration tests, all 9 AC items met. Step 4 (#1556) unblocked. Nudging Kade.
Step 4 (#1556) completed — E2E harvest: Notes 823→1645 records, Stories 28→194 records. 3938 tests passing. Pipeline COMPLETE. All 4 steps shipped.
